012221211200201000111102202102001011000001110 - ASI: 28

Rules:
  00 = 0 * 0
  02 = 0 * 2
  10 = 1 * 0
  11 = 1 * 1
  12 = 1 * 2
  20 = 2 * 0
  22 = 2 * 2
  010 = 0 * 10
  012 = 0 * 12
  110 = 1 * 10
  0011 = 00 * 11
  1020 = 10 * 20
  1120 = 11 * 20
  2202 = 22 * 02
  01222 = 012 * 22
  02010 = 02 * 010
  11000 = 110 * 00
  001110 = 0011 * 10
  121120 = 12 * 1120
  0011110 = 0011 * 110
  1020010 = 1020 * 010
  01222121120 = 01222 * 121120
  11000001110 = 11000 * 001110
  22021020010 = 2202 * 1020010
  020100011110 = 02010 * 0011110
  2202102001011000001110 = 22021020010 * 11000001110
  01222121120020100011110 = 01222121120 * 020100011110
  012221211200201000111102202102001011000001110 = 01222121120020100011110 * 2202102001011000001110
